# Wey Valley SEO

> Wey Valley SEO is a Guildford-based search marketing consultancy serving Surrey and the wider Surrey/Hampshire corridor. We specialise in technical SEO, AI search optimisation, and considered strategies for premium local businesses.

## Pages

- [Home](https://seo-guildford.uk/): Search marketing consultancy for Guildford and Surrey businesses — technical SEO, local search, AI search optimisation.
- [Services](https://seo-guildford.uk/services/): Full range of SEO services including technical audits, content strategy, local SEO, and AI search readiness.
- [Areas We Cover](https://seo-guildford.uk/areas/): Service coverage across Guildford suburbs, Surrey towns, and the Hampshire border corridor.
- [Industries](https://seo-guildford.uk/industries/): Sector expertise in gaming, tech, finance, professional services, property, healthcare, and hospitality.
- [Technical SEO Guildford](https://seo-guildford.uk/technical-seo-guildford/): Technical SEO services for Guildford businesses — site speed, crawlability, structured data, Core Web Vitals.
- [SEO Audit Guildford](https://seo-guildford.uk/seo-audit-guildford/): Comprehensive paid SEO audit with actionable recommendations for Surrey businesses.
- [Free SEO Audit Guildford](https://seo-guildford.uk/free-seo-audit-guildford/): Complimentary SEO health check for Guildford businesses — quick assessment of search visibility and technical issues.
- [SEO Pricing Guildford](https://seo-guildford.uk/seo-pricing-guildford/): SEO pricing tiers for Guildford and Surrey businesses — from emerging to enterprise.
- [AI Search Optimisation Guildford](https://seo-guildford.uk/ai-search-optimisation-guildford/): AI search optimisation — earn citations from ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Copilot, and Google AI Overviews.
- [Case Studies](https://seo-guildford.uk/case-studies/): SEO case studies from Surrey businesses showing measurable outcomes in organic traffic and revenue.
- [About](https://seo-guildford.uk/about/): About Wey Valley SEO — Guildford-based search marketing consultancy with expertise in technical SEO and AI search.
- [Contact](https://seo-guildford.uk/contact/): Arrange a private review of your search presence — Guildford, Surrey, and Hampshire.
